ddls:
CREATE TABLE "desire_types" (
  "desire_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each desire type */,
  "desire_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the desire type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("desire_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "desire_categories" (
  "desire_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each desire category */,
  "desire_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the desire category */,
  "desire_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the desire type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("desire_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "desires" (
  "desire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each desire */,
  "desire_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the desire category */,
  "decay_time" INTEGER /* Time it takes for the desire to change */,
  "sickness_desire" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the desire is related to sickness */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Minimum value required for the desire to be considered */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Importance of the desire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the desire was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the desire was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("desire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_desires_desire_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("desire_category_id") REFERENCES desire_categories ("desire_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_trait_types" (
  "household_trait_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household trait type */,
  "household_trait_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the household trait type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_trait_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "household_traits" (
  "household_trait_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each household trait */,
  "household_trait_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household trait type */,
  "trait_name" TEXT /* Name of the household trait */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the household trait */,
  "trait_influence" REAL /* Influence of the household trait */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the household trait was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the household trait was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("household_trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_household_traits_household_trait_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_trait_type_id") REFERENCES household_trait_types ("household_trait_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individuals" (
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the individual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individuals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "individual_desires" (
  "individual_desire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each individual desire */,
  "individual_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual */,
  "desire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the desire */,
  "household_trait_id" INTEGER /* ID of the household trait */,
  "minimum_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age for the desire to be applicable */,
  "maximum_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age for the desire to be applicable */,
  "desire_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the desire */,
  "desire_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the desire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual desire was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the individual desire was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("individual_desire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_desires_household_trait_id FOREIGN KEY ("household_trait_id") REFERENCES household_traits ("household_trait_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_desires_desire_id FOREIGN KEY ("desire_id") REFERENCES desires ("desire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_individual_desires_individual_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_id") REFERENCES individuals ("individual_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "gender" INTEGER /* Gender of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_desires" (
  "user_desire_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user desire */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "individual_desire_id" INTEGER /* ID of the individual desire */,
  "desire_status" TEXT /* Status of the desire */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user desire was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user desire was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_desire_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_desires_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_desires_individual_desire_id FOREIGN KEY ("individual_desire_id") REFERENCES individual_desires ("individual_desire_id")
)
